detail.description:
💥 Match colors, smash blocks, and clear the wood board in NO TIMER Block Color Mania!✨

Each vibrant block has its own shape and matching color gate. Your goal? Drag every piece to its color-coded exit. No filling rows - this is a challenging, precision-driven twist on the classic wood block puzzle, with no time limits and zero pressure. Relax and enjoy the challenge at your own pace!

With silky-smooth controls, bold visuals, and that oh-so-satisfying smash when a block hits its target, this g
